title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-Francois Bouchard demonstrate techniques for ingesting notes, documents, videos, and code repositories into memory systems for AI agents. This addresses the problem of grounding agents with persistent, retrievable knowledge from diverse sources.
